subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by Thy name whereby calamities have laid hold on all the tribes of the earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به اخذت الزلازل قبائل الارض کلها و فزع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
